target: Franchise Agreement Clause Walk (Exhibit F, pp.187-236)

clauses.obligation: License to operate one GREAT CLIPS salon at approved location
3/4-mile radius from primary entrance; 1/10 mile in dense areas
clauses.restriction: Non-Traditional Locations excluded from protected area

clauses.obligation: 10 years from date of salon opening
No right to renew. Renewal at GC sole discretion for additional 10 years
clauses.trigger: Compliance, notice, upgrade to current standards, $1,750 fee, general release, sign then-current FA

clauses.obligation: Use Marks only as prescribed. Display required notice of independent ownership
clauses.restriction: No use in corporate name, domain name, social media without approval. GC may change Marks at franchisee expense

clauses.obligation: 6% CFF biweekly, 5% Ad Fund biweekly, $200/yr training, $750/yr RTF, all via ACH
clauses.money: 14% per annum late charges; audit costs if 5% discrepancy or 2% underpayment

clauses.obligation: Complete QuickConnect within 180 days. All brand-delivery personnel complete Academy within 30 days of hire. Managers complete LEADS within 90 days
clauses.restriction: GC may require re-training at renewal

clauses.obligation: GC must consent to site. Franchisee solely responsible for locating and evaluating. Must use GC exclusive real estate agent when pursuing GC-sourced sites

clauses.trigger: Must open within 24 months of FA date or GC may cancel

clauses.obligation: Comply with Operations Manual. Upgrade/refurbish every 7-10 years ($20k-$80k). Annual maintenance $3k-$9k. Full range of required services/products

License POS software from ICS ($250/mo). Use Foundation Technologies for network/hardware. Use Heartland for payment processing. Maintain internet at GC-designated speed. Comply with Customer Data Access Policy
clauses.restriction: GC has independent unimpeded access to all salon data. All data is GC proprietary property

clauses.obligation: 5% Ad Fund contribution. Join local Co-op. Grand opening per GC policy. No self-developed advertising without approval
clauses.restriction: No internet advertising without GC permission. GC has sole authority over Ad Fund spending

clauses.obligation: Provide standard electronic accounting forms and reports as specified by GC
$1M/$2M general liability, all-risk property coverage at replacement cost, workers' comp. GC as additional insured, primary and non-contributory. 30-day cancellation notice
Franchisee indemnifies GC against all claims arising from franchisee's operation
GC has 60 days to match any bona fide offer. New ROFR if offer changes. Transaction must close within 120 days
All assignments require GC consent. $1,500 fee. Assignee must sign new FA for balance of term, general release, guaranty. No assignment if salon not operating (except selling all salons)
clauses.restriction: No public offerings including the salon/FA. Assignee must meet current qualifications

clauses.obligation: Heirs/executor must apply for consent and pay assignment fee
All disputes arbitrated in Minneapolis, MN. Litigation in Hennepin County, MN. Prevailing party gets costs and attorneys' fees
clauses.restriction: Waiver of jury trial. Waiver of punitive damages. Personal jurisdiction in MN. Provisions survive termination

clauses.trigger: Impairment of Marks/System, insolvency, bankruptcy, inability to pay debts, abandonment (3 days closed without approval), criminal conviction, unauthorized assignment, failure to renew per 3.3, material misrepresentation, lease default, unauthorized use of confidential info, material misuse of customer data, breach of noncompete/confidentiality, default under GC-guaranteed lease
Non-payment: 7-day cure. All other breaches: 30-day cure. Cross-default: breach of any FA with GC
30-day notice for repeated breaches or material breach not curable by nature

clauses.obligation: Cease all use of Marks. Assign telephone number to GC. Pay all sums. Return manuals. De-identify location. Execute general release. Comply with noncompete
Upon termination/expiration/non-renewal, GC has right (not obligation) to buy equipment/furnishings at appraised value
Maintain confidentiality of all System Standards, manuals, training, customer data. Ensure employee compliance
clauses.restriction: No use for ML/AI without written consent. No input into generative AI platforms. Must opt out of AI data usage

clauses.obligation: You and spouse: (a) during term — no haircare/grooming business at any location/internet; (b) 1 year post-term — within 5 miles of any GC salon; (c) 1 year post-assignment — within 5 miles of any GC salon
clauses.restriction: Broad definition of Retail Haircare Business. No 1%+ interest in competitor/franchisor. Court may reduce scope if unenforceable

clauses.obligation: Must identify all equity holders and Designated Operator(s) with ownership interest
Representation that no persons associated with terrorism hold interest in franchise
Each shareholder with any equity interest must personally guaranty complete and timely performance of all franchisee obligations including all fees and expenses
Required on renewal, transfer, and termination. Releases GC and affiliates from all claims
clauses.exceptions: Subject to state law — certain states prohibit general release as condition of renewal

clauses.obligation: No specific liquidated damages formula identified in the franchise agreement text
No explicit force majeure provision identified in text layer

distinctive_clauses: AI/ML prohibition (Section 20.1) — Prohibits use of proprietary information for machine learning, AI training, or generative AI platforms
Data ownership (Section 10) — All salon sales, customer, and operational data is proprietary to Great Clips; franchisee has limited license only
3-day abandonment trigger (Section 17.1(d)) — Salon closed 3 consecutive days without approval constitutes abandonment and grounds for immediate termination
Broad ROFR with 120-day window (Section 14) — GC has 60 days on any offer; if terms change, new 60-day period begins
Unlimited personal guaranty — No cap on guarantee amount; every equity holder must sign
